description_long: This is a pair of athletic running shoes featuring a knit-textured upper in a dark gray and black colorway, accented with blue highlights around the heel collar and tongue. The shoes have a low-cut design with a flexible, white, wavy-patterned foam sole that provides cushioning and support. Black synthetic overlays reinforce the midfoot and heel areas, while the lacing system uses standard black laces for a secure fit. The interior appears padded for comfort, and the heel counter is slightly raised for added stability. The shoes are designed for urban environments, offering both style and functionality for walking or running on city streets. No visible branding or logos are present, giving the shoes a versatile and understated appearance.
description: A pair of dark gray and black athletic running shoes with blue accents, white foam soles, and black laces. The design is modern, comfortable, and suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the knit-textured upper, blue heel accent, and wavy white sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the blue heel collar, padded interior, and heel counter details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the synthetic overlays, blue accents, and overall shoe profile.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the toe box, lacing system, and the knit pattern on the upper.
